pr.title: Deduplicate usage of unknown sobjlib struct
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Centralized a repeatedly inlined unknown SObj-related struct into a shared typedef, HSD_SObj_803A477C_t, declared in sobjlib.h and forward.h. The PR updated game-mode code and lbMthp APIs to use the shared type, and cleaned sobjlib.c by including sobjlib.h instead of carrying duplicate extern prototypes locally.
what_changed: Added HSD_SObj_803A477C_t in src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.h with known fields at offsets 0x10, 0x14, and byte fields at 0x3C through 0x3F.
Added a forward declaration for HSD_SObj_803A477C_t in src/sysdolphin/baselib/forward.h.
Replaced local anonymous struct declarations in gmMovieEnd, gmOmake15, and gmOpening with HSD_SObj_803A477C_t*.
Removed the local struct sobj definition from gmRegtyFall and replaced struct sobj* variables with HSD_SObj_803A477C_t*.
Changed lbMthp_8001F624 return type from UNK_T to HSD_SObj_803A477C_t*.
Changed HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype return type from UNK_T to HSD_SObj_803A477C_t*.

Moved sobjlib function declarations into sobjlib.h, including placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations for still-unknown functions HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4, HSD_SObjLib_803A466C, and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.
Updated sobjlib.c to include sobjlib.h directly and removed duplicate local extern declarations and now-unneeded includes.
smart_moves: Promoted a repeated anonymous/local struct shape into a shared header type instead of letting multiple game-mode files maintain divergent copies.
Named the placeholder type after the factory-like symbol HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, making the uncertain type searchable while avoiding overclaiming a final semantic name.
Preserved incomplete knowledge with padding and offset-style field names rather than inventing names for unknown fields.
Improved type propagation at API boundaries by changing lbMthp_8001F624 and HSD_SObjLib_803A477C to return HSD_SObj_803A477C_t* instead of UNK_T.
Reduced header/prototype drift by making sobjlib.c consume sobjlib.h rather than maintaining private duplicate externs.
decomp_lessons: When the same anonymous struct layout appears across several matched files, move it into the closest owning subsystem header even if the final semantic type name is unknown.
A temporary address-derived typedef can be valuable when it eliminates duplicate local layouts and improves function prototypes, as long as the name signals uncertainty.
Use forward.h for shared opaque/incomplete type declarations needed across subsystem boundaries.
Replace UNK_T return values with typed pointers as soon as callsites reveal a consistent pointee layout.
Keep unknown struct fields offset-based and padded to preserve layout truth without pretending field semantics are known.
Including the public subsystem header from the implementation file helps catch mismatches between declarations and definitions/prototypes.
naming_conventions: Introduced HSD_SObj_803A477C_t for an unknown SObj-related struct associated with HSD_SObjLib_803A477C.
Retained offset-style member names x10, x14, x3C, x3D, x3E, and x3F for fields with unknown semantics.
Used pad0 and pad18 arrays to document known layout gaps.
Used HSD_SObjLib_803Axxxx function names with address comments in sobjlib.h, matching existing decomp naming for unidentified baselib symbols.
Used UNK_RET and UNK_PARAMS for functions whose signatures are still not known enough to type precisely.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Type-only refactor preserved the observed struct layout while replacing local declarations, minimizing risk to matching.
The struct layout keeps exact offsets with padding arrays, allowing existing field accesses at 0x10, 0x14, and 0x3C-0x3F to remain representable.
Changing UNK_T to a concrete pointer type improves compiler type information without necessarily changing generated code.
No explicit assembly tricks, fakematches, or reviewer-provided matching tactics were present in the supplied PR excerpt.
review_feedback: No review comments were included in the provided PR context.
The PR had one issue comment according to counts, but its body was not present in the supplied excerpt, so no concrete review feedback can be extracted.
searchable_terms: Deduplicate usage of unknown sobjlib struct
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename HSD_SObj_803A477C_t to a semantic SObj type.
Search for remaining anonymous structs with fields x10/x14 or x3C-x3F that may also be HSD_SObj_803A477C_t.
Investigate callers of lbMthp_8001F624 to propagate HSD_SObj_803A477C_t further.
Resolve signatures for HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4, HSD_SObjLib_803A466C, and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 currently declared with UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Compare HSD_SObjLib_803A477C allocation/initialization behavior against the HSD_SObj_803A477C_t layout.
